name: Billy Gene Jackson  Sr. Park
description: Billy Gene Jackson Sr. Park is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Centennial Village Tennis Courts
description: Centennial Village Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Richard A. Henson Family YMCA
description: Richard A. Henson Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Salisbury Middle School
description: When all courts are occupied, the courts have a court reservation method of placing your paddles on the court sign.
fees: Fee required — $40 registration per player in league. 5$ per session on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

name: The Courts at Harmon Field
description: The Courts at Harmon Field is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: The Indoor Courts At Live Fit
description: The Indoor Courts At Live Fit is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — Daily rate $15, Membership rates vary including 24/7 access to Live Fit Gym nexdoor.

name: The Salvation Army - Lower Eastern Shore
description: The Salvation Army - Lower Eastern Shore is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Winterplace Park
description: Winterplace Park is a place to play pickleball in Salisbury, MD. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: WinterPlace Park & Equestrian Center
description: Come play pickleball at WinterPlace Park & Equestrian Center in Salisbury, MD! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
